title: Document and package the Pi ticks orchestrator
description: Finish distribution and documentation for the Pi orchestrator extension. Update skills/ticks references and package docs so users understand installation, commands, config, model routing, durable state, security boundaries, recovery, dashboard usage, and limitations. Include notes explaining relationship to Pi's generic subagent extension.
acceptance_criteria: Docs include pi install/local install instructions, all slash commands, .tick/config.md Pi Orchestrator keys, dashboard controls, recovery playbook, and boundary model. Package can be installed locally by Pi and loads both skill and extension. pi-runner.md no longer sounds stale relative to Pi's subagent extension.
closed_reason: Completed: packaged skill+extension for Pi local/git installation and documented commands, explicit execution safety, configuration, GPT-5.6 routing, dashboard controls, artifacts, boundary model, recovery playbook, testing, generic-subagent relationship, and limitations.
